data.title: Western Digital (Nasdaq: WDC) to report Q2 FY 2026 results on January 29, 2026, after market close. Conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific/4:30 p.m. Eastern. Webcast at investor.wdc.com.
data.description: A technology company based in San Jose, California, Western Digital Corp. (Nasdaq: WDC) is set to reveal its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 on January 29, 2026, after the market closes. Following this, on the same day, they will conduct a conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific / 4:30 p.m. Eastern with investors to analyze these results. An opportunity to access a live audio webcast and a replay of the conference call will be provided at investor.wdc.com. More information about Western Digital can be found on their website.

data.title: Article discusses changing approaches to transformation journeys. Popular New Year's Resolution is getting healthier. National Quitter's Day on January 9th trends are noted.
data.description: Prepare yourself with the resources necessary to continue progress on your journey of transformation past National Quitter's Day on January 9th. According to a report from Woodbury, Minnesota on January 12, 2026, the top New Year's Resolution for many is to improve their health through improved nutrition and exercise. After the new year, a significant number of individuals aim to adopt a healthier lifestyle, with many seeking ways to make lasting changes in their habits.

data.title: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth visits Rocket Lab headquarters during "Arsenal of Freedom" tour, emphasizing the importance of private space sector in defense strategy. Rocket Lab seen as cornerstone of defense industrial base. RKLB stock rising.
data.description: Last week, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth visited Rocket Lab Corp. headquarters on a tour called "Arsenal of Freedom," marking a significant change in the Pentagon's approach towards the private space industry. Hegseth, self-proclaimed "Secretary of War," highlighted Rocket Lab (NASDAQ: RKLB) as a crucial element of the country's defense industrial base, asserting that future battles will be determined in space. Approximately 200 Rocket Lab employees were addressed by Hegseth, who discussed the Pentagon's new procurement strategy and positioned Rocket Lab as the cornerstone of the nation's defense industry. Following the visit, RKLB stock has seen an increase. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: USA Compression Partners LP acquires J-W Power Company for $860 million, funded $430 million in cash.
data.description: USA Compression Partners, LP (NYSE: USAC) has confirmed the finalization of its acquisition of J-W Power Company. The total cost of the transaction amounted to around $860 million. To finance the purchase, USAC utilized $430 million in cash from their revolving credit facility, while the remaining portion was covered through the issuance of roughly 18.2 million common units at a predetermined price.

data.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific partners with NVIDIA to advance lab performance using AI technology; collaboration aims to boost automation and accuracy at scale.
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE: TMO) recently revealed a significant partnership with NVIDIA aimed at enhancing AI-driven solutions and expanding laboratory automation on a large scale. By utilizing the NVIDIA Artificial Intelligence (AI) platform alongside Thermo Fisher Scientific's technologies, this collaboration aims to boost the efficiency, precision, and pace of laboratory operations. Through this joint effort, the focus is on advancing the digital infrastructure that supports scientific endeavors.

data.title: Brad Gerstman releases "Best Dressed in Politics" list for 2025 in NYC, featuring top fashion figures.
data.description: In a recent announcement dated January 12, 2026, Brad Gerstman, a government relations attorney located in Manhattan and a key figure at Gerstman PLLC, has unveiled his latest "Best Dressed in Politics" compilation for the year 2025. This yearly tradition, which spotlights the most stylish individuals in the political sphere, has garnered attention as a cheerful and anticipated event among the audience.

data.title: ADM will announce Q4 2025 financial results on Feb. 3, 2026, with a webcast at 7:30 am CT. Press release and presentation will be available. Visit www.adm.com/webcast.
data.description: In Chicago, ADM (NYSE: ADM) disclosed that a management audio webcast is scheduled for Tuesday, February 3, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. Central Time to review financial outcomes for Q4 of 2025 and to offer a company update. Ahead of the call, ADM will release a press statement and accompanying presentation, accessible at ADM - Investor Relations. For the webcast, visit www.adm.com/webcast. Following the event, a replay will be available.

data.title: PA Housing Finance Agency launches $35 million HOME-ARP program to create/ preserve rental housing for homeless/at-risk Pennsylvanians.
data.description: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, on January 12, 2026, the Pennsylvania Housing Finance Agency revealed the availability of $35 million in funding for the newly launched HOME-ARP initiative. This program aims to develop and maintain rental housing for vulnerable and homeless residents of Pennsylvania. The HOME-ARP initiative is tailored to address the housing needs of...

data.title: Expro Group Holdings N.V. will discuss Q4 and full year results on Feb 19, 2026 in a 10:00 am CT conference call.
data.description: Expro Group Holdings N.V. (NYSE: XPRO) will host a conference call on February 19, 2026, to review performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. The call is set to commence at 10:00 a.m. CT (11:00 a.m. ET). Results will be shared via a press release before the market opens on February 19, with accompanying presentation slides.

data.title: Crescent Energy to release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 25 and host conference call on Feb 26 at 10 a.m. CT. Website for info: www.crescentenergyco.com.
data.description: Houston-based Crescent Energy Company (NYSE: CRGY) has revealed its intention to hold a conference call and webcast at 10 a.m. CT on Thursday, February 26, 2026. This discussion will cover the financial and operating outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, along with a preview of the outlook for 2026. Results are slated for release after the market closes on Wednesday, February 25, 2026. Interested parties can access the release and supplementary slides on the company’s official website at www.crescentenergyco.com. The upcoming conference call presents an opportunity for stakeholders to delve into the company's recent performance and future prospects.

data.title: Five Star Franchising has 2 brands on Top 200 Franchises list for owner support and satisfaction. (Total: 200)
data.description: Card My Yard and Five Star Bath Solutions have been recognized for their exceptional owner support and satisfaction, earning them a spot on a prestigious list. This news was unveiled by Five Star Franchising, a prominent platform hosting various home service franchise brands. The announcement was made on January 8, 2026 in Springville, Utah. This recognition highlights the remarkable dedication of Card My Yard and Five Star Bath Solutions towards their owners, showcasing their commitment to providing top-notch services.

data.title: Chipotle makes key leadership changes: Ilene Eskenazi now Chief Legal & HR Officer, Stephanie Perdue interim CMO. Reaffirms guidance.
data.description: Chipotle Mexican Grill recently announced the appointment of Ilene Eskenazi as the Chief Legal and Human Resources Officer. Stephanie Perdue, the Vice President of Brand Marketing, has been appointed as the Interim Chief Marketing Officer. The company confirmed its full-year 2025 guidance during the announcement. The news was disclosed in Newport Beach, California, on January 12, 2026.

data.title: Edgewell Personal Care Company [NYSE: EPC] to discuss Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 9, 2026, in investor conference call.
data.description: Shelton, Connecticut - On January 12, 2026, Edgewell Personal Care Company, trading as EPC on the New York Stock Exchange, announced that they will release their financial figures for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 before the market opens on February 9, 2026. The company will delve into their performance in an investor conference call following the release.

data.title: Hydro One (TSX: H) to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 13, 2026 before markets open. Teleconference at 8am ET.
data.description: Hydro One Limited, the leading electric transmission and distribution utility in Ontario, is scheduled to hold an investment community teleconference on February 13, 2026, at 8 a.m. ET. The company, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under ticker symbol H, will announce its fourth quarter financial results on the morning of February 13.

data.title: Marriott International to release Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 10, 2026, at 7:00 am ET. Conference call for investors to follow.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Bethesda-headquartered Marriott International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MAR) announced the release of its fourth quarter 2025 earnings results scheduled for Tuesday, February 10, 2026, at around 7:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). The company plans to conduct a conference call for investors and analysts on that day.

data.title: Hormel Foods announces retirements of Mark Morey and Paul Peil, leaders in fresh pork ops.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Hormel Foods Corporation, a Fortune 500 global branded food company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HRL, revealed that two long-serving executives are set to retire. Mark Morey, who currently serves as the vice president of operations for fresh pork, and Paul Peil, the vice president of [department name], will both be stepping down. This announcement marks a significant change within the company's leadership team.
